case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. MARIA R RIVASPLATA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT RIVASPLATA, MARIA R DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2021
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200036244)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT MARIA R RIVASPLATA (TRANSACTION ID # 200024552) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 200041804) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-26-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
